## Roadmap — Graph Executor & LLM Planner

### v0.6.1 Graph Executor MVP

- [x] StepExecutionResult / GraphExecutionResult / ExecutionContext
- [x] `uri3 run-workflow` (`--dry-run`, `--approve`)
- [x] mock browser adapter (`browser://`, `dom://`, `screen://`)
- [x] assertion adapter (`assertion://contains|equals|...`)
- [x] hypervisor dry-run adapter (`hypervisor://deployment/...`)
- [x] command nodes require `--approve`
- [x] workflow event JSONL (`output/events/workflows/{id}.jsonl`)
- [x] `examples/14_workflow_executor_mock`

### v0.6.2 Real Browser Adapter

- [x] optional Playwright extra (`pip install -e '.[browser]'`)
- [x] `browser://chrome/page/open`
- [x] `dom://chrome/active/body` (`read` / `extract_dom`)
- [x] `screen://browser/active/screenshot`
- [x] artifacts on disk under `output/artifacts/workflows/...`
- [x] `examples/15_playwright_browser`

### v0.6.3 LLM Graph Planner

- [x] graph planner prompt with operation registry injection
- [x] schema validation + repair invalid graph
- [x] no invented handlers — only allowed schemes/operations

---

*To execute all tasks, run: `prefact -a --execute-todos`*
